artPrompt: A young human clerk on her first day, lanyard and cardigan, standing uncertain and small amid towering beige filing cabinets, clutching a blank folder, glancing lost down an endless hazy corridor, cold cyan light washing her hopeful tired face, a faint arcane glow seeping from the paperwork around her, tender and a little doomed, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Temp Staffer, Day One
text: When Temp Staffer, Day One dies, create a 1/1 white Clerk creature token. (They sent a replacement before the body was cold.)
flavorText: "Where's the bathroom?" were her first and, tragically, last words on the job.
